name: Tomato-Bread Casserole
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 oz Can Whole peeled tomatoes - cut up
1 cup Lowfat cottage cheese or Ricotta cheese
1/4 cup Olive oil or vegetable oil
1/2 tsp Lawry's Garlic Powder with Parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread bread slices with margarine; cut into large cubes.
2. Arrange the cubes on a jelly roll pan and toast in a 350-degree oven for about 7 minutes.
3. Place half of the cubes in a greased 13x9x2 baking dish.
4. Drain canned tomatoes, reserving the liquid.
5. Top the bread cubes with half of the fresh tomato slices, half of the reserved tomato liquid, half of the cottage cheese or ricotta cheese, half of the oil, and half of each of the seasoned salt, oregano, garlic powder, and parsley.
6. Repeat layers.
7. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
8. Bake, covered, in a 350-degree oven for 40 minutes.
9. Uncover and bake an additional 5 minutes to brown the top.
